# Copilot Instructions — Connect Dump Analyser

## What this project is

A **vanilla JS, no-build, single-page web app** that lets BRAC University students browse, search, and compare course section data exported from USIS ("Connect"). It runs entirely in the browser — open `index.html` directly, no server or bundler needed.

Live URL: https://connect-dumps.itzmrz.xyz/

---

## Architecture

All JS is loaded as plain `<script>` tags in `index.html`. Modules communicate through global objects.

```
index.html          Entry point / markup / table skeleton
styles.css          All styles (responsive, dark mode via CSS vars)
js/
  config.js         CONFIG global — semesters list, CDN URL, pagination, cache settings
  utils.js          Utils global — data normalisation, cache helpers, time helpers
  dataService.js    DataService global — fetching, caching, state management
  uiController.js   UIController global — DOM wiring, rendering, events
  app.js            IIFE entry point — calls init in order: UIController → DataService → loadSemesterData
```

**Load order matters**: `config.js` → `utils.js` → `dataService.js` → `uiController.js` → `app.js`.

---

## Data flow

1. On startup `DataService.preloadAllSemesterData()` fires `loadSemesterData()` for every semester in **parallel** (`Promise.all`).
2. For the **current** semester (`isCurrent: true`), it tries the CDN (`https://usis-cdn.eniamza.com/connect.json`) first; falls back to the local JSON file.
3. For **past** semesters it checks `localStorage` cache first (60-minute TTL), then loads the local JSON file.
4. Raw JSON is normalised by `Utils.normalizeCourseData(data, format)` into a flat course object:

```js
{
  code, section, faculty, facultyInitial,
  schedule,      // [{ day, start, end }] — start/end in minutes since midnight
  labSchedule,   // same shape
  examDate, seats: { available, booked, capacity, waitlist? },
  room, labRoom
}
```

5. `UIController.loadSemesterData(semesterId)` pulls the cached array from `DataService` and renders rows.

---

## Two JSON data formats

| Format key  | Used for                          | Notes |
|-------------|-----------------------------------|-------|
| `spring25`  | Spring 2025 onwards (new USIS)    | `sectionName`, `faculties`, `sectionSchedule.classSchedules[]`, `consumedSeat`/`capacity` |
| `old`       | Fall 2024, Summer 2024            | `courseDetails`, `empName`, `classSchedule` string, `availableSeat`/`totalFillupSeat`/`defaultSeatCapacity` |

Always check `semester.dataFormat` in `config.js` before touching normalisation logic.

---

## Adding a new semester

1. Drop the JSON dump in the repo root (e.g. `fall-26.json`).
2. Add an entry to `CONFIG.dataSources.semesters` in `js/config.js`:
   ```js
   {
     id: 'fall26',
     name: 'Fall 2026',
     file: 'fall-26.json',
     year: '2026',
     dataFormat: 'spring25',   // or 'old' for pre-2025 dumps
     isCurrent: true           // only ONE semester should be isCurrent
   }
   ```
3. Set `isCurrent: false` on the previously current semester.
4. No other changes needed — the UI generates semester buttons dynamically.

---

## Key conventions

- **No framework, no build step.** Do not introduce npm, bundlers, or transpilers.
- **Global singletons**: `CONFIG`, `Utils`, `DataService`, `UIController` are window-level globals. Do not wrap in modules.
- **`CONFIG.debug`** flag gates verbose logging; keep production value `false`.
- Cache key format: `coursePortalData_v2_<semesterId>` (generated by `Utils.getSemesterCacheKey()`).
- Time values are always stored as **minutes since midnight** (integers) internally; use `Utils.timeToMinutes()` / `Utils.formatTime()` to convert.
- The CDN endpoint returns either a bare array, `{ data: [] }`, or `{ sections: [] }` — `loadSemesterData` handles all three shapes.
- Dark mode is CSS-var based; toggled via a checkbox `#themeToggle` and saved to `localStorage`.
- First-visit help modal is shown once via `localStorage('hasVisitedBefore')`.

---

## UI state owned by UIController

| State | Where |
|-------|-------|
| Current sort column + direction | `UIController.sortState` |
| Table zoom level (1–5) | `UIController.zoomState.level` |
| Cached DOM refs | `UIController.elements` |

---

## DataService state

| Field | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| `_semesterData[id]` | Normalised course array for each semester |
| `_semesterDataSource[id]` | `'cdn'` \| `'local'` \| `'cache'` |
| `_state.currentSemester` | Active semester config object |
| `_state.filteredData` | Currently displayed (after search/filter) |
| `_state.currentPage` | Pagination cursor |

---

## Status badge values

Defined in `CONFIG.statusMessages`: `loading`, `liveData`, `offlineData`, `localData`.
Call `UIController.updateDataStatus(key, vars?)` — `localData` accepts `{ semester, year }` template vars.

---

## CSP

The `Content-Security-Policy` meta tag in `index.html` whitelists:
- `https://usis-cdn.eniamza.com` (CDN data)
- `https://fonts.googleapis.com` / `https://fonts.gstatic.com` (Material Icons)
- `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net` (Bootstrap Icons)

If you add a new external resource, update the CSP accordingly.
